strengths: Staff Engineer at re:cinq with 20 years of engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, infrastructure, and DevOps
Founded GISCollective (2016–present) and created multiple open-source projects (Fluent-Asserts, Trial, Vibe.dav)
Demonstrated leadership through mentoring: organized code katas, created Web Internals workshop, led 3-module Selenium training course
concerns: AI/ML platform expertise gap: 20-year career shows no AI/ML products or platforms; AI infrastructure work began 14 months ago at re:cinq
Cloud platform strategy expertise absent: AWS CDK and Kubernetes appear as operational tools at Optilyz, not as strategic product architecture work
No advanced AI credentials: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science only; no Master's/PhD in AI, no research publications, no recognized AI expertise
response.justification: Candidate meets baseline requirements with 20 years of engineering experience and current Staff Engineer role. However, this position specifically requires principal-level AI strategy expertise with demonstrated AI/ML products and platforms. Resume shows 14 months of AI infrastructure work at re:cinq but no prior AI/ML career track record. Strong engineering leadership and entrepreneurial credentials are assets, but the specialized AI platform expertise central to this role is not demonstrated.
